label: Garden AI improvements
items: The assistant now takes action decisively — ask it to set up a schedule, add a plant, or link an ailment and it stages the change ready for you to confirm, instead of only describing it.
It looks up your beds, devices and schedules itself instead of asking you for names or IDs, diagnoses plant problems directly, and no longer offers to add plants you already have.
Answers now follow a consistent, easy-to-scan format, and plant care-detail lookups return real data every time.
